title: SG Vaults
description: A simple mod to unlock trial vaults already used by a player with a regular trial key (ominous vaults also use a regular key to be unlocked again).
body: A simple mod to unlock trial vaults already used by a player with a regular trial key (ominous vaults also use a regular key to be unlocked again). ![Trial keys unlock vaults to be used again](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2469f9d698108e584f1796fb5e60b20cc942911e.png)
